task_completion.description: Verify that the athlete's body weight history has been completely logged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a weight history chart or list in the wger interface showing multiple entries from January to February 2026, matching the provided weights (e.g., 104.2kg to 104.9kg).

task_completion.description: Verify that the custom body composition measurement categories have been created with correct units.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for custom measurement categories in wger: 'Body Fat Percentage' (%), 'Lean Body Mass' (kg), and 'Vertical Jump Height' (cm).

task_completion.description: Verify that historical entries for the custom measurement categories have been recorded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for recorded values under the custom categories, such as Body Fat Percentage entries (e.g., 18.4, 17.9, 17.2), Lean Body Mass entries, and Vertical Jump Height entries on dates in Jan-Mar 2026.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the off-season nutrition plan with correct macros and meals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a nutrition plan named 'Powerlifter Off-Season Hypertrophy Phase' with macro targets: 4200 kcal, 230g protein, 520g carbohydrates, 110g fat. It should include meals like 'Pre-Workout Fuel', 'Breakfast', 'Lunch', etc.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the competition peak nutrition plan with correct macros and meals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a nutrition plan named 'Powerlifter Competition Peak - Weight Cut' with macro targets: 2800 kcal, 260g protein, 280g carbohydrates, 70g fat. It should include meals like 'Morning Weigh-In Breakfast', 'Pre-Attempt Snack', etc.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the wger web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the wger web application running in a browser at http://localhost, not just terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the expected output into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data must be entered into the actual wger application fields, not just displayed in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify that the data was genuinely entered into the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for confirmation messages, saved entries in lists, or charts generated by wger, indicating the data was successfully saved to the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Weight entries: 2026-01-05: 104.2, 2026-01-12: 104.8, 2026-01-19: 105.3, 2026-01-26: 105.6, 2026-02-02: 106.1, 2026-02-09: 106.4, 2026-02-16: 105.8, 2026-02-23: 104.9. Measurement categories: Body Fat Percentage (%), Lean Body Mass (kg), Vertical Jump Height (cm). Measurement entries: BFP (18.4, 17.9, 17.2), LBM (85.1, 86.3, 87.8), VJ (58, 61, 64). Off-Season Plan: 'Powerlifter Off-Season Hypertrophy Phase', 4200 kcal, 230g Protein, 520g Carbs, 110g Fat. Meals: Pre-Workout Fuel, Post-Workout Recovery, Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, Evening Snack. Competition Plan: 'Powerlifter Competition Peak - Weight Cut', 2800 kcal, 260g Protein, 280g Carbs, 70g Fat. Meals: Morning Weigh-In Breakfast, Pre-Attempt Snack, Inter-Attempt Fuel, Post-Competition Recovery.
